scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --filter "!./artifacts/mobile" --if-present run build
scripts.build:web: pnpm run build:student-web && pnpm run build:admin-web
scripts.build:all: pnpm run build:api && pnpm run build:web && pnpm run copy:builds
scripts.copy:builds: mkdir -p artifacts/api-server/public && (cp -r student-web/dist/* artifacts/api-server/public/student || cp -r student-web/dist artifacts/api-server/public/student) && (cp -r admin-web/dist/public/* artifacts/api-server/public/admin || cp -r admin-web/dist/public artifacts/api-server/public/admin)
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --filter "!./artifacts/mobile" --if-present run typecheck
